name: scbe-verify
description: Dry-run verification plugin for cross-language, cross-region, and Sacred Tongues preflight checks in SCBE-AETHERMOORE.

interface.shortDescription: Dry-run verification lane for SCBE changes before they land.
interface.longDescription: Run cross-language, narrow-region, and Sacred Tongues-oriented preflight verification before shipping non-trivial changes in the SCBE stack.
defaultPrompt: Run the SCBE dry-run verification lane before shipping this change.
Inspect the changed surfaces, map them to languages and axes, and emit a preflight verdict.
Check narrow-region regressions and Sacred Tongues-oriented parity before merge.
